jobs.job_description:
Job Description

Primary Function of Position

We are seeking a Senior Data Analytics & Full Stack Engineer to design and develop interactive, data-driven applications using open-source Python frameworks (such as Plotly Dash, Panel, or FastAPI-based web applications), integrated with modern data platforms such as Snowflake and dbt. This role combines deep expertise in analytics engineering with full-stack Python development to deliver scalable, self-service data solutions that support operations, planning, and decision-making.

The ideal candidate will partner closely with data analysts, data scientists, and business stakeholders to simplify access to insights, improve data quality, and drive automation. This role requires strong experience working within supply chain and operations domains, enabling the development of impactful solutions across planning, logistics, and manufacturing functions.

Essential Job Duties

Data Engineering & Analytics
• Design, build, and maintain scalable data pipelines using Python, dbt, Airflow, and/or Spark
• Develop curated, version-controlled datasets with well-defined metrics and business logic
• Ensure high data quality through testing frameworks, monitoring, and anomaly detection
• Optimize performance of data models and queries within cloud data platforms (Snowflake preferred)

Application Development
• Design and develop user-centric, interactive web applications using open-source frameworks such as Plotly Dash, Panel, or FastAPI-based front ends for data exploration, reporting, and workflow automation
• Build modular, reusable components for visualizations, data input/editing, approval workflows, and predictive use cases
• Deliver scalable and maintainable full-stack solutions leveraging Python frameworks (FastAPI, Flask)

Integration & Platform
• Integrate applications with Snowflake, S3, Smartsheet, and REST APIs to enable end-to-end data workflows
• Support CI/CD pipelines, version control, and containerized deployments (Docker)

Collaboration & Leadership
• Partner with stakeholders across supply chain, operations, and analytics teams to translate business requirements into technical solutions
• Collaborate with Enterprise Analytics teams to ensure alignment with data governance, security, and compliance standards
• Lead design decisions and promote engineering best practices across data and application development
• Mentor junior engineers and contribute to a culture of continuous improvement
• Document systems, processes, and methodologies for broader organizational use

Operational Expectations
• Maintain overlapping working hours with PST mornings for collaboration with global teams and stakeholders

#LI-Hybrid

Data Engineer, People Analytics

What you can expect
Zoom is seeking an experienced Data Engineer to join our People Analytics team within the IT department. In this role, you will architect and maintain robust data infrastructure that powers analytics for our People Experience (PX) organization. You'll design scalable ETL pipelines, build optimized data models, and ensure data quality across multiple HR systems. Transforming raw people data into reliable, analytics-ready datasets that drive strategic workforce decisions.

About the Team
Zoom's Information Technology team is dedicated to delivering customer happiness, enhancing business efficiency, and fostering agility through innovation, data insights, and automation. Our impact is evident in seamless user experiences, streamlining processes, and supporting Zoom's growth in communication and collaboration. We deliver data infrastructure and analytics for Zoom's People Experience organization. Our team collaborates across IT and HR to build reliable, scalable solutions. We exist to turn people data into actionable insights that drive strategic workforce decisions.

Responsibilities

• Designing and implementing ETL pipelines that integrate data from multiple HR systems into unified, analytics-ready datasets.

• Building and maintaining scalable data infrastructure using Airflow for orchestration and dbt for transformation.

• Developing optimized data models and schemas that support reporting requirements across the People Experience organization.

• Creating comprehensive data quality monitoring systems that ensure accuracy and reliability of people analytics.

• Partnering with analysts and business stakeholders to translate complex requirements into scalable data solutions.

What we’re looking for

• Hold a Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Systems, or related field, or equivalent practical experience.

• Bring 5+ years of experience in data engineering roles.

• Demonstrate proficiency in SQL and Python for data manipulation and analysis.

• Apply 2+ years of hands-on experience with Airflow for workflow orchestration.

• Apply 2+ years of hands-on experience with dbt for data transformation.

• Leverage expertise in AWS data services and cloud infrastructure.

• Bring experience working with Workday or similar HR systems is advantageous.

• Apply knowledge of data visualization tools such as Tableau or Power BI is advantageous.

Ways of Working
Our structured hybrid approach is centered around our offices and remote work environments. The work style of each role, Hybrid, Remote, or In-Person is indicated in the job description/posting.

Benefits
As part of our award-winning workplace culture and commitment to delivering happiness, our benefits program offers a variety of perks, benefits, and options to help employees maintain their physical, mental, emotional, and financial health; support work-life balance; and contribute to their community in meaningful ways. Click Learn for more information.

About Us
Zoomies help people stay connected so they can get more done together. We set out to build the best collaboration platform for the enterprise, and today help people communicate better with products like Zoom Contact Center, Zoom Phone, Zoom Events, Zoom Apps, Zoom Rooms, and Zoom Webinars.
We’re problem-solvers, working at a fast pace to design solutions with our customers and users in mind. Find room to grow with opportunities to stretch your skills and advance your career in a collaborative, growth-focused environment.

Our Commitment​
At Zoom, we believe great work happens when people feel supported and empowered. We’re committed to fair hiring practices that ensure every candidate is evaluated based on skills, experience, and potential. If you require an accommodation during the hiring process, let us know—we’re here to support you at every step.

If you need assistance navigating the interview process due to a medical disability, please submit an Accommodations Request Form and someone from our team will reach out soon. This form is solely for applicants who require an accommodation due to a qualifying medical disability. Non-accommodation-related requests, such as application follow-ups or technical issues, will not be addressed.

Our interviews are supported by BrightHire, a tool that helps us create a consistent and thoughtful interview experience and may include recordings. Please refer to our candidate privacy statement for more information of how we use your data.

#LI-Remote

Introduction

A career in IBM Consulting is built on long-term client relationships and close collaboration worldwide. You’ll work with leading companies across industries, helping them shape their hybrid cloud and AI journeys. With support from our strategic partners, robust IBM technology, and Red Hat, you’ll have the tools to drive meaningful change and accelerate client impact. At IBM Consulting, curiosity fuels success. You’ll be encouraged to challenge the norm, explore new ideas, and create innovative solutions that deliver real results. Our culture of growth and empathy focuses on your long-term career development while valuing your unique skills and experiences.

Your Role And Responsibilities

As a Data Engineer: Business Intelligence, you will design, build, and manage solutions using web-based BI reporting technology to provide personalized features and intuitive designs. This role involves integrating Business Intelligence Platforms to enable seamless toggling between reporting and analysis tasks.

Your Primary Responsibilities Will Include

• Design and Build Solutions: Design and build web-based BI reporting solutions that offer personalized features, such as drill-down capabilities and intuitive design kits, to enhance user experience.
• Integrate BI Platforms: Integrate Business Intelligence Platforms to enable users to easily toggle between reporting and analysis tasks, promoting efficient workflows.
• Develop Reports: Develop reports that can be distributed over the web, via email, or through portals or file servers, ensuring flexibility in report sharing and access.
• Implement Reporting Tools: Implement reporting tools, such as Cognos, Actuate, MicroStrategy, and Tableau, to create interactive dashboards and scorecards that support business decision-making.

Preferred Education

Master's Degree

Required Technical And Professional Expertise

• Exposure to Business Intelligence: Familiarity with designing, building, and managing solutions using web-based BI reporting technology, including personalized features and intuitive designs.
• Experience with Reporting Tools: Hands-on experience with reporting tools such as Cognos, Actuate, MicroStrategy, and Tableau, including creating interactive dashboards and scorecards.
• Integration Expertise: Experience with integrating Business Intelligence Platforms to enable seamless toggling between reporting and analysis tasks.
• Report Development Skills: Ability to develop reports that can be distributed over the web, via email, or through portals or file servers.
• Dashboard Development: Experience with developing dashboards and scorecards using tools like Click and Tableau to support business decision-making.

Preferred Technical And Professional Experience

• Familiarity with Dashboards: Exposure to developing dashboards and scorecards using tools like Click and Tableau to support business decision-making.
• Knowledge of Reporting Tools: Experience working with various reporting tools such as Cognos, Actuate, MicroStrategy, and Tableau.
• Exposure to BI Platforms: Familiarity with integrating Business Intelligence Platforms to enable seamless toggling between reporting and analysis tasks.

We are urgently looking for multiple experienced Senior / Lead Data Engineer to lead the design and delivery of enterprise-scale data engineering solutions. The ideal candidate will have strong expertise in Python, Hadoop, Apache Spark, ETL/ELT pipelines, Data Modelling, SQL/NoSQL, and CI/CD, while providing technical leadership, mentoring teams, and delivering scalable, secure, and high-quality data solutions.

Key Skills:-

• Having atleast 5+ years of experience as Data Engineer

• Strong experience with Python, Apache Spark, Hadoop, and Splunk.

• Design and optimise ETL/ELT pipelines and enterprise data ingestion frameworks.

• Expertise in Data Modelling, SQL, NoSQL, and large-scale data processing.

• Build scalable, resilient, and governed data engineering solutions.

• Implement CI/CD pipelines, Git, and automated testing practices.

• Collaborate with BI, Analytics, and Data Science teams.

• Lead technical delivery, solve complex data engineering challenges, and manage multiple projects.

• Mentor engineers and drive engineering best practices.

• Ensure data governance, security, resilience, and compliance standards.

If interested please mail your resume to jobs.india@pixelcodetech.com

We are looking for a skilled Senior Data Engineer with expertise in Azure and Snowflake to join our team immediately. The ideal candidate will have a strong background in data engineering and excellent problem-solving skills.

Roles and Responsibility

• Design, develop, and implement large-scale data pipelines using Azure and Snowflake.

• Collaborate with cross-functional teams to identify and prioritize project requirements.

• Develop and maintain complex data models and architectures.

• Ensure high-quality data processing and analysis.

• Troubleshoot and resolve technical issues efficiently.

• Implement data security and access controls.

Job Requirements

• Strong experience in data engineering with a focus on Azure and Snowflake.

• Excellent problem-solving skills and attention to detail.

• Ability to work in a fast-paced environment and meet deadlines.

• Strong communication and collaboration skills.

• Experience with data modeling and architecture.

• Ability to design and implement scalable data solutions.

About Company

India Health Link Pvt. Ltd. is a leading healthcare company committed to providing high-quality patient care services. We are dedicated to leveraging technology to improve healthcare outcomes and enhance patient experiences.

jobs.job_title: Senior Data Engineer – Data Mapping & Integration
jobs.job_description:
The job profile for this position is Data Management Strategy & Governance Senior Analyst, which is a Band 3 Senior Contributor Career Track Role.

Excited to grow your career?

We value our talented employees, and whenever possible strive to help one of our associates grow professionally before recruiting new talent to our open positions. If you think the open position you see is right for you, we encourage you to apply!

Our people make all the difference in our success.

About the Team and Role

We are looking for a hands-on Senior Data Engineer with strong data mapping and integration expertise to join our international data engineering function. This role combines deep technical delivery with upstream data analysis and mapping, helping ensure that complex source data is accurately modelled, integrated, and made available to downstream consumers in a consistent and governed way.

You will work at the intersection of data mapping, data engineering, and data management, collaborating closely with business stakeholders, data analysts, product teams, and other engineers across multiple timezones. The role plays a key part in delivering high‑quality, well‑governed data solutions that underpin digital channels, analytics, and operational reporting.

Key Responsibilities

Data Mapping & Analysis

• Own and deliver source‑to‑target data mappings for inbound and outbound data flows aligned to the enterprise common data model

• Work with business and technical stakeholders to gather, evaluate, validate, and document data requirements

• Plan and facilitate mapping workshops, including preparation, gap analysis, follow‑ups, and incorporation of change requests

• Perform impact analysis on data model and mapping changes and maintain mapping documentation and metadata

• Validate mapping outcomes using SQL queries and provide data quality feedback and metrics

• Act as a bridge between data engineering, data governance, and business teams

Data Engineering & Integration

• Design, develop, and maintain ETL / ELT processes supporting both project delivery and business‑as‑usual workloads

• Develop and enhance data pipelines using SQL, SSIS, and/or modern cloud-based tooling

• Monitor and support production data processes, including batch runs, releases, and issue resolution

• Troubleshoot complex data and performance issues within relational database environments

• Contribute to improvements in code quality, performance, tooling, and ways of working

• Support and evolve data integration patterns as the platform moves towards cloud‑native solutions

Collaboration & Governance

• Work within Agile delivery teams, contributing to planning, estimation, and delivery

• Maintain strong stakeholder relationships and communicate clearly on progress, risks, and dependencies

• Ensure solutions adhere to data governance, security, and quality standards

• Contribute to the continual improvement of data management and data engineering practices

Essential Skills and Experience

• Minimum 5 years experience in data engineering and data integration roles

• Proven experience delivering data mapping / source‑to‑target mappings against a common data model

• Advanced SQL skills, including complex queries, views, stored procedures, and performance tuning

• Experience building and supporting ETL processes

• Solid understanding of relational data models, OLTP and OLAP environments

• Experience working in Agile teams and collaborating with cross‑functional stakeholders

• Excellent analytical, problem‑solving, and communication skills

• Ability to work independently, manage multiple priorities, and see work through end‑to‑end

Desirable / Nice to Have

• Experience with cloud platforms (AWS and/or Azure)

• Python, Databricks, or modern data engineering frameworks

• Experience with metadata or data management tools (e.g. Collibra or similar)

• Knowledge of source control (Git) and CI/CD pipelines

• Experience across SQL Server, Oracle, and/or Postgres

• Exposure to AI‑assisted development or data tooling

• Experience in regulated or data‑intensive industries (e.g. healthcare, insurance, financial services)

The Person We’re Looking For

• A proactive, detail‑oriented engineer who enjoys working from requirements through to production

• Comfortable operating between business language and technical implementation

• Confident facilitating workshops and influencing stakeholders

• Passionate about data quality, structure, and doing things the “right way”

• Curious, adaptable, and keen to grow with evolving data platforms

Please note that you must meet our posting guidelines to be eligible for consideration. Policy can be reviewed at this link.

Bring more to life.

Are you ready to accelerate your potential and make a real difference within life sciences, diagnostics, and biotechnology?

At SCIEX, one of Danaher’s 15+ operating companies, our work saves lives—and we’re all united by a shared commitment to innovate for tangible impact.

You’ll thrive in a culture of belonging where you and your unique viewpoint matter. And by harnessing Danaher’s system of continuous improvement, you help turn ideas into impact – innovating at the speed of life.

As part of SCIEX, you will help to influence life-changing research and outcomes, while accelerating your potential. For more than 50 years, we have been empowering our customers to solve the most impactful analytical challenges in quantitation and characterization through ground-breaking innovation and outstanding reliability and support. You will be part of a winning team, enabled by DBS, that is passionate about helping life science experts around the world get to answers they can trust.

Learn about the Danaher Business System, which makes everything possible.

The Lead Data Engineer is responsible for delivering complete, accurate, and trusted data solutions across multiple source systems and modern cloud platforms. This role performs advanced hands‑on data engineering work while providing technical leadership on complex initiatives, enabling scalable data architecture and data‑driven decision‑making.

This position is part of the Global IT organization supporting SCIEX, Molecular Devices, and the Life Sciences Platform. This position reports to the Senior Manager - IT Applications and will be fully remote from India.

In this role, you will have the opportunity to:
• Partner with business stakeholders to design and deliver scalable data warehouse and analytics solutions.

• Design, develop, and optimize data pipelines, orchestration workflows, and database objects across Azure SQL, Snowflake, Microsoft Fabric, and Power BI environments.

• Monitor, troubleshoot, and improve data pipeline reliability and performance in production environments.

• Provide technical guidance and act as a point of escalation through code reviews, design reviews, and knowledge sharing.

• Lead hands-on development of complex data integrations, ensuring alignment with data architecture and enterprise standards.

• Maintain data models, technical documentation, and version control practices.

Essential requirements of the job include:
• 7+ years of experience designing and developing enterprise data warehouse and analytics solutions.

• Strong hands-on experience building and optimizing ETL/ELT pipelines using Azure Data Factory and/or Microsoft Fabric.

• Advanced experience working with cloud data platforms (e.g., Azure SQL Database, Snowflake, Microsoft Fabric).

• Experience in monitoring, troubleshooting, and optimizing production data pipelines and data warehouse performance.

• Proven experience providing technical guidance on complex data engineering work while remaining hands-on.

It would be a plus if you also possess previous experience in:
• Experience collaborating with offshore or distributed development teams

• Exposure to data quality, governance, or security practices

No travel required; collaboration across global teams may require flexibility in working hours

Join our winning team today. Together, we’ll accelerate the real-life impact of tomorrow’s science and technology. We partner with customers across the globe to help them solve their most complex challenges, architecting solutions that bring the power of science to life.

For more information, visit www.danaher.com.

Our Purpose

Mastercard powers economies and empowers people in 200+ countries and territories worldwide. Together with our customers, we’re helping build a sustainable economy where everyone can prosper. We support a wide range of digital payments choices, making transactions secure, simple, smart and accessible. Our technology and innovation, partnerships and networks combine to deliver a unique set of products and services that help people, businesses and governments realize their greatest potential.

Title and Summary

Sr Tester/Data Engineer

Overview

The AI Innovation at Scale team is seeking a highly motivated and detail-oriented Quality Assurance Engineer to join our team. This role is critical in ensuring the delivery of high-quality products by assessing requirements, identifying issues, and implementing effective testing strategies. The ideal candidate is curious, detail-oriented, technically skilled, and thrives in a collaborative environment. You will play a key role in improving quality management and continuous improvement.

Role

In this position, you will:

Review and provide feedback on requirements and technical documentation.

Plan, design, and implement comprehensive test strategies and test cases.

Execute white-box and black-box testing to identify product deficiencies.

Collaborate closely with team members to resolve issues and improve quality.

Monitor QA processes and identify bottlenecks for improvement.

Investigate quality issues and propose actionable solutions.

Collect and analyze data to support quality improvements.

Prepare quality reports for the team.

Participate in requirement analysis and engineering solution discussions.

All About You

The ideal candidate for this position should:

Be curious, meticulous and eager to learn new technologies and methodologies.

Possess strong technical skills relevant to QA work.

Demonstrate critical and creative thinking in problem-solving.

Have excellent time management and organizational skills.

Communicate effectively with stakeholders.

Desirable capabilities:

Experience in software development and software QA.

Proficiency in QA methodologies, processes, and tools.

Ability to write clear, concise, and comprehensive test plans and cases.

Familiarity with appropriate testing tools and frameworks.

Familiarity with various environments such as Hadoop, CDP, PCF, and Databricks.

Basic knowledge of data science and Generative AI concepts.

Proficient with Unix/Linux commands.

Working knowledge of Python and Java applications.

Use Impala and Spark for data queries and validation.

Monitor Spark job execution, perform initial analysis, and collect logs.

Corporate Security Responsibility

All activities involving access to Mastercard assets, information, and networks comes with an inherent risk to the organization and, therefore, it is expected that every person working for, or on behalf of, Mastercard is responsible for information security and must:
• Abide by Mastercard’s security policies and practices;

• Ensure the confidentiality and integrity of the information being accessed;

• Report any suspected information security violation or breach, and

• Complete all periodic mandatory security trainings in accordance with Mastercard’s guidelines.

? Hiring Alert | Snowflake Data Platform Engineer ?

? Location: Mumbai
? Role: Data Platform Engineer – Snowflake
? Experience: 4–6 Years
? CTC: Up to ₹12 LPA

We are looking for an experienced Snowflake Data Platform Engineer with strong expertise in Snowflake Data Warehouse, ETL/ELT pipelines, and cloud data engineering.

Requirements

• Strong hands-on experience with Snowflake Data Warehouse
• Experience building scalable ETL/ELT data pipelines
• Advanced SQL and Snowflake performance tuning
• Experience with Snowpipe, Streams, Tasks, and Stored Procedures
• Strong knowledge of structured and semi-structured data processing
• Experience ensuring data quality, security, and governance
• Exposure to GenAI initiatives and modern data engineering practices
• Strong communication and stakeholder management skills

Join us as a “Senior Data Engineering" at Barclays, where you'll spearhead the evolution of our digital landscape, driving innovation and excellence. You'll harness cutting-edge technology to revolutionise our digital offerings, ensuring unapparelled customer experiences.

You may be assessed on the key critical skills relevant for success in role, such as experience with, skills to meet business requirement as well as job-specific skillsets

To be successful as Senior Data Engineering you should have experience with:
• Expert-level proficiency in AWS cloud services including S3, Glue, Athena, Lake Formation, and CloudFormation, with hands-on experience designing and operating cloud-native data platforms.
• Strong Python programming skills at a senior level, applied to data engineering, pipeline development, and automation.
• Solid experience with ETL/ELT frameworks, data transformation patterns, and data quality tooling (e.g., Great Expectations, dbt, or similar).
• Working knowledge of Snowflake for data warehousing, query optimisation, and integration within broader data ecosystems.
• Experience with Apache Iceberg or similar open table formats for managing large-scale, versioned analytical datasets.

Some other highly valued skills may include:
• Experience with Apache Airflow or similar workflow orchestration tools for scheduling and monitoring complex data pipelines.
• Familiarity with IAM, permissions management, and data access governance within AWS (Lake Formation policies, resource-based policies, role-based access).
• Understanding of data cataloguing and metadata management practices to support discoverability and governance of enterprise datasets.
• Experience with Databricks or Starburst for distributed data processing and federated query engines.
• Ability and willingness to collaborate with diverse internal teams across technology, data, and business functions to drive adoption and alignment.

This role is based in Pune.

Purpose of the role

To build and maintain the systems that collect, store, process, and analyse data, such as data pipelines, data warehouses and data lakes to ensure that all data is accurate, accessible, and secure.

Accountabilities
• Build and maintenance of data architectures pipelines that enable the transfer and processing of durable, complete and consistent data.
• Design and implementation of data warehoused and data lakes that manage the appropriate data volumes and velocity and adhere to the required security measures.
• Development of processing and analysis algorithms fit for the intended data complexity and volumes.
• Collaboration with data scientist to build and deploy machine learning models.

Assistant Vice President Expectations
• To advise and influence decision making, contribute to policy development and take responsibility for operational effectiveness. Collaborate closely with other functions/ business divisions.
• Lead a team performing complex tasks, using well developed professional knowledge and skills to deliver on work that impacts the whole business function. Set objectives and coach employees in pursuit of those objectives, appraisal of performance relative to objectives and determination of reward outcomes
• If the position has leadership responsibilities, People Leaders are expected to demonstrate a clear set of leadership behaviours to create an environment for colleagues to thrive and deliver to a consistently excellent standard. The four LEAD behaviours are: L – Listen and be authentic, E – Energise and inspire, A – Align across the enterprise, D – Develop others.
• OR for an individual contributor, they will lead collaborative assignments and guide team members through structured assignments, identify the need for the inclusion of other areas of specialisation to complete assignments. They will identify new directions for assignments and/ or projects, identifying a combination of cross functional methodologies or practices to meet required outcomes.
• Consult on complex issues; providing advice to People Leaders to support the resolution of escalated issues.
• Identify ways to mitigate risk and developing new policies/procedures in support of the control and governance agenda.
• Take ownership for managing risk and strengthening controls in relation to the work done.
• Perform work that is closely related to that of other areas, which requires understanding of how areas coordinate and contribute to the achievement of the objectives of the organisation sub-function.
• Collaborate with other areas of work, for business aligned support areas to keep up to speed with business activity and the business strategy.
• Engage in complex analysis of data from multiple sources of information, internal and external sources such as procedures and practises (in other areas, teams, companies, etc).to solve problems creatively and effectively.
• Communicate complex information. 'Complex' information could include sensitive information or information that is difficult to communicate because of its content or its audience.
• Influence or convince stakeholders to achieve outcomes.

All colleagues will be expected to demonstrate the Barclays Values of Respect, Integrity, Service, Excellence and Stewardship – our moral compass, helping us do what we believe is right. They will also be expected to demonstrate the Barclays Mindset – to Empower, Challenge and Drive – the operating manual for how we behave.
